name: Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General - Fondo De Inversion Larrainvial Deuda Privada F
summary: Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General - Fondo De Inversion Larrainvial Deuda Privada F invests in private debt instruments. It is managed by Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General. The fund aims to generate returns through investments in privately placed debt, offering potential yield advantages over publicly traded debt.
